channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [OSWAYRN] Oswal Yarns Board Meeting on May 27, 2026 to Approve Audited Results
item.description:
Oswal Yarns Ltd has scheduled a Board of Directors meeting on May 27, 2026, to consider and approve the Audited Financial Results for the year ended March 31, 2026. The trading window, which closed on April 1, 2026, will remain closed until 48 hours after the declaration of the financial results.

  • Oswal Yarns board meeting set for May 27, 2026.
  • Agenda includes approval of audited financial results for FY26.
  • Trading window remains closed until 48 hours post results.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: OSWAL YARNS LTD. | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [UCOBANK] UCO Bank: Subhash Shankar Malik Ceases to be Director
item.description:
Mr. Subhash Shankar Malik ceased to be a Director of UCO Bank effective May 8, 2026, upon completion of his three-year term. He was appointed as a Part-time Non-Official Director on the Board of Directors of the Bank on May 8, 2023, as per Government of India notification F.No.6/8/2022-BO.I under section 9(3)(h) of the Banking Companies (Acquisition and Transfer of Undertakings) Act, 1970. The cessation occurred at the close of business hours on May 7, 2026.

  • Subhash Shankar Malik's term as Director ended May 8, 2026.
  • Appointment was based on Govt. of India notification dated May 8, 2023.
  • Cessation is due to completion of the three-year tenure.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: UCO BANK | Category: Management Change

item.title: [APOLLO] Apollo Micro Systems Receives Orders Worth ₹510.25 Million
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Apollo Micro Systems Ltd has announced that it has received orders totaling ₹510.25 million in the ordinary course of its business. These orders include ₹174.78 million from the Ministry of Defence, ₹95.28 million from Public Sector Defence Undertakings and ₹240.18 million from Private Companies. The company has provided this information to its shareholders.

  • Apollo Micro Systems receives total orders worth ₹510.25 million.
  • Orders from Ministry of Defence amount to ₹174.78 million.
  • Public Sector Defence Undertakings contribute ₹95.28 million in orders.
  • Private Companies account for ₹240.18 million of the total orders.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Apollo Micro Systems Ltd | Category: Business Update

item.title: [AWFIS] Awfis Space Solutions: Monitoring Agency Report for Mar 2026
item.description:
Awfis Space Solutions Ltd has released the Monitoring Agency Report for the quarter ended March 31, 2026, as per Regulation 32(6) of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015 and Regulation 41(4) of SEBI (Issue of Capital and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2018. The report, issued by CARE Ratings Limited, indicates no deviation from the objects of the IPO, which aggregated to ₹128.0 crore. The Audit Committee and the Board of Directors have reviewed and taken the report on record.

  • Awfis Space Solutions releases Monitoring Agency Report for Q4 2026.
  • CARE Ratings Limited issued the report with no deviations noted.
  • Report relates to IPO aggregating to ₹128.0 crore.
  • Audit Committee and Board of Directors reviewed and approved the report.
  • Report confirms compliance with SEBI regulations.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Awfis Space Solutions Ltd | Category: Regulatory

item.title: [TRUECOLORS] True Colors Ltd Launches New Commercial Printing Product Line
item.description:
🔥 Trending

True Colors Ltd has expanded into the Commercial Printing, Labeling, and Flexible Packaging segments with a new product line launch. The product range includes Web-to-Sheet Book Printing Machines, Sheet-fed Book Printing Machines, Digital Label Printers, Label Embellishment Printers, Flexible Packaging Printing Machines, Label Die-Cutting & Finishing Machines, and related accessories. The company aims to capitalize on domestic demand in India during Phase 1 and position itself as a one-stop solution provider.

  • True Colors expands into commercial printing and packaging.
  • New product line includes printing and finishing machines.
  • Phase 1 focuses on the Indian domestic market.
  • Aims to be an integrated solution provider for labeling and packaging.
  • Expansion reduces reliance on textile-focused operations.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: True Colors Ltd | Category: New Launch

item.title: [TATAPOWER] Tata Power & Bhutan DGPC Add 404 MW Hydropower Project
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Tata Power and Druk Green Power Corporation (DGPC) have expanded their clean energy collaboration in Bhutan by adding the 404 MW Nyera Amari I & II Integrated Hydropower Project to their portfolio. This amendment to the original MoU increases the total identified hydropower capacity under the partnership to 5,033 MW from 4,500 MW. The collaboration aims to support Bhutan's vision of reaching 25,000 MW of generation capacity by 2040 and enhance regional energy security. The projects will be developed with mutually agreed equity participation.

  • Tata Power and DGPC expand partnership to over 5,000 MW hydropower portfolio.
  • Nyera Amari I & II Integrated Hydropower Project (404 MW) added to the portfolio.
  • Collaboration supports Bhutan's energy sector vision for 25,000 MW capacity by 2040.
  • Projects to be developed with mutually agreed equity participation.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: TATA POWER CO.LTD. | Category: Partnership

item.title: [VMM] Vishal Mega Mart Board Meeting on 14/05/2026 to Approve Financial Results
item.description:
Vishal Mega Mart Ltd has scheduled a Board of Directors meeting on May 14, 2026, to consider and approve the audited standalone and consolidated financial results for the quarter and financial year ended March 31, 2026. The trading window for dealing in the company's shares is closed for designated persons and their immediate relatives from April 1, 2026, and will remain closed until 48 hours after the announcement of the financial results.

  • Board meeting scheduled for May 14, 2026, to approve financial results.
  • Audited standalone and consolidated results for FY26 will be considered.
  • Trading window closed from April 1, 2026, until 48 hours post results announcement.
  • Meeting is pursuant to Regulation 29 & 33 of SEBI Listing Regulations, 2015.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Vishal Mega Mart Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [AUTOPRD] Indra Kumar Bagri & PACs Increase Stake in Automobile Products
item.description:
Indra Kumar Bagri, along with Persons Acting in Concert (PACs) Seema Pugalia and Manjari Bagri, have increased their shareholding in Automobile Products of India Ltd. The acquisition, disclosed under Regulation 29(1) of SEBI (SAST) Regulations, 2011, involved the acquisition of shares, resulting in a change in the total share capital of the company. Indra Kumar Bagri's holding increased to 4.89%, Seema Pugalia's to 0.1220%, and Manjari Bagri's to 0.0731%. The total holding of the acquirer and PACs after the acquisition is 5.09%.

  • Indra Kumar Bagri and PACs acquired additional shares in Automobile Products of India Ltd.
  • The acquisition is governed by SEBI (SAST) Regulations, 2011.
  • Indra Kumar Bagri's individual holding increased to 4.89% of the company.
  • Total shareholding of the acquirer and PACs now stands at 5.09%.
  • The equity share capital of the company after the acquisition is INR 62,17,071.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: AUTOMOBILE PRODUCTS OF INDIA LTD. | Category: Shareholding

item.title: [HCG] HCG: Motilal Oswal Schemes Dispose of 5,19,430 Shares
item.description:
Motilal Oswal BSE Healthcare ETF & Others disposed of 5,19,430 shares of HealthCare Global Enterprises Ltd. (HCG) as per Regulation 29(2) of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares & Takeovers) Regulations, 2011. The disposal, executed through market transactions, reduced the collective holding of the Motilal Oswal Mutual Fund schemes to 42,76,983 shares, representing 2.8646% of the total share capital. The transaction date was May 4, 2026.

  • Motilal Oswal Mutual Fund schemes disposed of 5,19,430 shares in HCG.
  • The disposal reduced their shareholding to 2.8646% of HCG's equity.
  • The transaction was executed through market transactions on May 4, 2026.
  • The disclosure was made under SEBI's Takeover Regulations.
  • HCG's equity share capital before and after disposal remains 14,93,02,203.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: HealthCare Global Enterprises Ltd | Category: Shareholding

item.title: [MIC] MIC Electronics Develops IPIS v2.0 for Indian Railways
item.description:
MIC Electronics Ltd has initiated the development of IPIS v2.0 for Indian Railways. The project is progressing as planned, with successful establishment of the product architecture. Dedicated teams are working on hardware, firmware, and Network Management System (NMS) application software development. The company is focused on a coordinated engineering approach for successful deployment of the solution and will keep the Stock Exchanges informed of further material developments.

  • MIC Electronics is developing IPIS v2.0 for Indian Railways.
  • The project's product architecture has been successfully established.
  • Dedicated teams are working on hardware, firmware, and NMS application software.
  • The project is on track toward product realization and delivery.
  • MIC will inform exchanges of further material developments.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: MIC ELECTRONICS LTD. | Category: Project Update
